toolRequests.intentionSummary: Build the project to see the error

data.reasoningText:
Now I can see the issue. The project has a target `GenerateSampleCode` that generates a C# file (`GeneratedInfo.cs`) before compilation, but the generated file is never added to the `Compile` item group. So MSBuild generates the file but the C# compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group after writing it. Let me also build it first to confirm the error.

arguments.description: Build the project to see the error

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-53c0b964e94e40278d0c1bf885a4fde2 && dotnet build 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build the project to see the error", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
The file is generated (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler can't find the `TestProject` namespace because the generated file is never added to the `Compile` item group.

The fix: add an `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="...">` for the generated file inside the target so Roslyn compiles it.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

data.content:
**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to the `obj/` directory but never added it to the `Compile` item group, so the C# compiler didn't know about it.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` inside the target so the generated file is included in compilation. The build and run both succeed now.
